data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「Arrived at the objective. Let's go straight to the next mission.」&「Cute swimsuits are justice... I'll keep that in mind.」
data.summary: [Pick Up Recruitment Preview] Rerun Unique Pick Up Recruitments will begin on 11/22 (Tue)! Target Pi
data.body:
[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

Rerun Unique Pick Up Recruitments will begin on 11/22 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Azusa(Swinsuit), 3★ Mashiro(Swimsuit)

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 11/22 (Tue) 02:00 – 11/29 (Tue) 02:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance
